ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-08-2026 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-26-2026 Off Calendar

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-06-2025 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jul-14-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-03-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated August 16, 2006, and the codicil dated June 26, 2018 are admitted to probate. Reynold Chan is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for July 14, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Lopes. Not reported.
